cover_letter_preview:
Dear Hiring Team,

The iCIMS ATS Administrator role at Enterprise Solution Inc. caught my attention because the core of the work, system configuration, user support, documentation, and keeping data clean across a platform that recruiters depend on daily, maps directly to what I did as Technical Operations Manager at BEAT THE BOMB.

At BEAT THE BOMB, I managed a help desk ticket system, authored SOPs and runbooks that codified fix paths for recurring issues, and supported user so new team members could get up and running without escalating every question. When processes broke down, I diagnosed the root cause, documented the resolution, and updated the runbook so the same issue wouldn't cost us time twice. That cycle, troubleshoot, document, train, repeat, is exactly what an ATS administrator does to keep recruiters productive and data accurate.

On the reporting and process side, I tracked operational KPIs, contributed to incident reporting and root cause analysis, and coordinated across departments to drive consistency in how work got done. At 1-800-GOT-JUNK, I managed scheduling and job tracking through Salesforce, coordinating across 50+ field personnel and resolving data discrep…
